title: hydrangea macrophylla f. hortensia
intro: Hydrangea macrophylla f. hortensia, also known as Bigleaf Hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea macrophylla f. hortensia include reducing fever, alleviating arthritis symptoms, and supporting kidney function, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
